zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery de Vere於大約1308年出生時，她的父親Sir Alphonse de Vere11306歲，母親Joan Foliot28歲。她於1331年12月29日與Sir Maurice Berkeley結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1351年5月21日在英國格盧斯特斯爾度斯利享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery de Vere于大约1308年出生时，她的父亲Sir Alphonse de Vere11306岁，母亲Joan Foliot28岁。她于1331年12月29日与Sir Maurice Berkeley结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1351年5月21日在英国格盧斯特斯爾度斯利享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name, mostly from Vair in Ancenis, named with Gaulish ver(n)- ‘alder’. This was the probable home in the 11th century of the Breton lord Aubrey (Albericus) de Ver, who followed William the Conqueror to England and founded an influential family who held the earldom of Oxford until 1703. In a few cases the surname could be from other places in France, such as Ver in Manche and Calvados, which have the same etymology as Vair.
French (mainy Vendée; Veré): variant of Vairé, from Old French vairie ‘variegated, spotted’, applied as a nickname for someone who has freckles.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery de Vere was born about 1308, her father, Sir Alphonse de Vere, was 11306 and her mother, Joan Foliot, was 28. She married Sir Maurice Berkeley on 29 December 1331. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 21 May 1351, in Dursley, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery de Vere est née environ 1308, son père, Sir Alphonse de Vere, avait 11306 ans et sa mère, Joan Foliot, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Maurice Berkeley le 29 décembre 1331. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 21 mai 1351, à Dursley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery de Vere um 1308 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Alphonse de Vere 11306 und ihre Mutter Joan Foliot 28. Sie hat am 29. Dezember 1331 Sir Maurice Berkeley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 21. Mai 1351 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Dursley, Gloucestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery de Vere è nata il circa 1308, sua padre, Sir Alphonse de Vere, aveva 11306 anni e sua madre, Joan Foliot, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Sir Maurice Berkeley il 29 dicembre 1331. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 21 maggio 1351, nel Dursley, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery de Vereが約1308年に生まれた時，父Sir Alphonse de Vereは11306歳，母Joan Foliotは28歳であった。1331年12月29日にSir Maurice Berkeleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1351年5月21日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアダルスリーで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery de Vere(이)가 대략 1308년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Alphonse de Vere(은)는 11306세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Foliot(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1331년 12월 29일 Sir Maurice Berkeley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1351년 5월 21일 영국 그루스스터실르 뒤르슬리에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery de Vere nasceu aproximadamente 1308, seu pai, Sir Alphonse de Vere, tinha 11306 anos e sua mãe, Joan Foliot, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Maurice Berkeley em 29 de dezembro de 1331. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 21 de maio de 1351, em Dursley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery de Vere родилась около 1308 г., её отцу по имени Sir Alphonse de Vere было 11306 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Foliot, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Maurice Berkeley 29 декабря 1331 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 21 мая 1351 г. в местности дурсли, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery de Vere nació aproximadamente 1308, su papá, Sir Alphonse de Vere, tenía 11306 años y su mamá, Joan Foliot, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Sir Maurice Berkeley el 29 de diciembre de 1331. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 21 de mayo de 1351, en Dursley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 44 años.
